title: Resolution Authorizing the Honorable Mayor Antonio L. Kalaw to Accept and Sign a Deed of Donation for and in Favor of the Municipal Government of Los Baños a Parcel of Land Donated by Virgilo F. Notario, Jr., Covered by Tax Declaration No. 11-0001-00036 / Tct 060-2018000834 Containing an Area of Five Hundred Fifty Nine (559) Square Meters Located at Barangay Baybayin, Los Baños, Laguna and Ratifying the Same Thereafter. (AUTHOR: HON. GERONIMO A. CICERON, 04/06/2021)
